title: Repeated proximity checks over addon entities
prompt:
In server-side Garry's Mod Lua, every Think you must find addon-owned entities of class my_addon_ent within radius of target. Avoid scanning every map entity each tick: seed a keyed set for entities that already exist, maintain it as entities appear/disappear, then use squared distance in the hot loop. Show initialization, registration, cleanup, and the Think hook.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: cold ents.FindByClass seed, maintained entity set, and DistToSqr in the repeated hot loop
